A clean workspace for writers and employers

How it Works

Simple steps. Calm workflow.

Everything is designed to keep work moving smoothly for both employers and writers without clutter.

Live order tracking
From first brief to final upload Track the progress of each task in one focused workspace.
1

Post or assign an order

Employers create a task, attach instructions, and can even assign work directly to a preferred writer they trust.

2

Write, track, and communicate

Writers review instructions, ask questions, upload files, and keep employers updated through real-time messaging.

3

Submit, review, and complete

Completed work is delivered inside the order, revisions stay organized, and ratings help both sides build trust over time.

For You

Choose the path that fits you and start from a cleaner, better-looking workspace.

Core tools for posting, tracking, communicating, and getting work delivered cleanly and professionally.

Messaging

M-Pesa / Airtel

Support for popular payment options with a familiar Kenya-friendly flow.

🧾

Auto-invoice

Payment details and order history are easier to track as work moves through the platform.

Dashboard

Frequently Asked Questions

Quick answers for common questions about orders, writers, payments, submissions, revisions, disputes, and account support.

Orders & Writers

  • 1How do employers post work? Use Post New Task, add full instructions, deadline, amount, and files, then submit the order.
  • 2How do writers get work? Writers browse Available Orders or receive direct assignments from employers who prefer them.
  • 3Can an employer choose a writer? Yes. Employers can assign to a preferred writer after working with them before.
  • 4Where are files found? Instruction and submission files stay inside the related order view.

Payments & Support

  • 1How are payments handled? Employers pay through the platform payment flow, and writer release is handled after approval.
  • 2What if something goes wrong? Use order messages first. If unresolved, open a dispute from the order.
  • 3Can orders be cancelled? Employers and admins can cancel orders when needed. Cancelled orders appear in the Cancelled tab.
  • 4Where do fines appear? Any fine attached to a cancelled or disputed order appears in the Fines tab.

Rules, Regulations & Privacy

Platform expectations for fair work, respectful communication, secure accounts, file privacy, payments, cancellations, and dispute handling.

Platform Rules

  • ✓Use order messages for all important task communication so the record stays clear.
  • ✓Do not share phone numbers, emails, or off-platform contact details in messages, profiles, or file names.
  • ✓Employers must provide complete instructions, realistic deadlines, and clear payment details.
  • ✓Writers must only accept work they can complete well and on time.
  • ✓Submitted work, files, and order details must not be shared outside the platform workflow. Uploads are limited to safe document and image formats.
  • ✓Disputes should be factual and tied to the order, files, messages, dates, or payment records.

Privacy & Safety

  • ✓Account passwords are handled by Supabase Auth and should never be shared with support or other users.
  • ✓Private order information should only be visible to the employer, assigned writer, and platform admin.
  • ✓Payment details are used only for order collection, payout records, and platform audit history.
  • ✓Cancelled orders and fines must include a clear reason so users can understand the decision.
  • ✓Users should log out on shared devices and enable notifications only on devices they trust.

Request Revision
Send this task back to the writer with feedback
Rate User
Share honest feedback after the order is completed.
Choose 1 to 5 stars.
Open Dispute
Describe the issue clearly so the other party can respond.
Tip: Keep this factual. Mention dates, instructions, submitted files, messages, or payment details when relevant.
Resolve Dispute
Choose how this dispute should be resolved.
Use this when the writer selected a time-extension reason, or when both sides agree that more time is needed.
Cancel Order
Cancel this order and record the reason for both sides.
Leave as 0 if no fine should be recorded.
Allow realtime notifications?
Turn on alerts for this device/browser so you do not miss important platform activity.
